title: Trichotosia fusca
taxonomy: I found that Trichotosia fusca is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Trichotosia. This classification places Trichotosia fusca within the larger group of flowering plants and orchids specifically. Within the Orchidaceae family, Trichotosia fusca is further categorized as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The specific classification of Trichotosia fusca can be represented as follows: Trichotosia fusca (Lindl.) Schltr., Orchidaceae.
